labels.name: noDeliveryAddressesBody
labels.value: We couldn’t proceed with checkout because there’s no saved shipping address and you don’t have the necessary buyer permissions to add one.

labels.name: noDeliveryMethodsErrorLabel
labels.value: Sorry, we can't deliver this item to the selected address. Change the items in your cart or update the delivery address. For more help, contact customer support.

labels.name: insufficientInventoryBody
labels.value: Some items are unavailable or out of stock.

labels.name: invalidContactPhoneBody
labels.value: Enter a valid phone number. Select your country code in the dropdown and enter your phone number in the field.

labels.name: fatalErrorBody
labels.value: We couldn't proceed with checkout. Return to the cart and try again.

labels.name: paymentErrorBody
labels.value: Check your payment information and try again.
